title: metrosideros bartlettii
intro: Metrosideros bartlettii, also known as the New Caledonian rātā or red rātā, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae, native to New Caledonia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Metrosideros bartlettii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and anticancer properties. Metrosideros bartlettii is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to treat various ailments, and its leaves and bark are often used in traditional medicine in New Caledonia.
